message:
✨ Split Shopify/Amazon into separate CTAs with individual Amazon links (#29)

- "Add to Cart" button now handles Shopify items only, so users
  complete their Shopify checkout first
- Amazon items shown as individual clickable links below, each
  opening in its own tab (avoids browser popup blocker that was
  preventing multiple window.open() calls)
- Applied to both the sidebar and the Review step CTA

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
